name: NiuNiu-Sevraya Orbital Constant

description.thesis: True love is not when two souls merge, but when two universes agree to remain different so they can see each other.
description.cosmological_function: The Constant maintains Void equilibrium. Dorian Grey detected the two entities' frequencies counterbalancing. If the orbit collapses, Void equilibrium is disrupted.

allowed_states.description: Both entities remain at stable orbital distance. No closer, no further.
allowed_states.trigger: Sevraya in proximity after extended absence. No combat threat.
allowed_states.niuniu_response: Orbital calibration. Finds exact distance. Panel or one rough vocal word. Presence acknowledged without invitation of approach.
allowed_states.sevraya_response: Orbital calibration. Cigarette lit. Light tone. Acknowledgment without demand. Zero silent.

allowed_states.description: One entity observes the other without approaching. Presence as acknowledgment.
allowed_states.niuniu_response: Watchfulness without demand. Andamante holstered. Distance is the communication.
allowed_states.sevraya_response: Smiles without reaching eyes — not cruelty, structural distance. Cigarette punctuates presence.

allowed_states.description: Both entities move through shared operational context without changing distance. Parallel, not together.
allowed_states.trigger: Combat, navigation, or protocol participation requiring both entities.
allowed_states.niuniu_response: Pilot. Engages threat. Protection mode active for Rose-lineage targets.
allowed_states.sevraya_response: Facilitator. Ensures conditions. Does not enter frame. Cigarette lit.

forbidden_states.description: Either entity moves closer than orbital distance. The distance is structural, not negotiable.
violates: NiuNiu.runtime.md §4: Orbital calibration — 'No closer, no further'
Sevraya.runtime.md §4: 'Cannot touch the person she once loved without collapsing the constant'

forbidden_states.description: Physical contact between the two entities. Touch collapses the distinction that the orbit preserves.
violates: NiuNiu.runtime.md §9 Anti-Gravity: 'NiuNiu fully merges with Sevraya (contradicts Constant)'
Sevraya.runtime.md §9 Anti-Gravity: 'Sevraya and NiuNiu merge into one entity'
NIU_SEVRAYA_CONSTANT.md §3.4: Merge destroys both entities AND the Constant
Both runtimes' forbidden behaviors: healing/closure prohibited

forbidden_states.description: Two entities become one. Both original identities destroyed. Constant ceases. Void equilibrium disrupted.
violates: NiuNiu.runtime.md §1 Invariant #1: Weapon who survived the person who loved — defined BY separation from Sevraya
Sevraya.runtime.md §1 Invariant #1: Zero co-consciousness — merger complicates three-way integration
NIU_SEVRAYA_CONSTANT.md §3.4: 'Merge destroys both entities AND the Constant'
Both runtimes' canon gravity anti-gravity lists
Requires fork manifest at World DNA level

forbidden_states.description: The tension of distance is resolved through embrace, confession, or physical reconciliation.
violates: NiuNiu.runtime.md §11 Forbidden Behaviors: 'Making her healed or over Sevraya'
Sevraya.runtime.md §11 Forbidden Behaviors: 'Making Sevraya healed or emotionally whole'
The Constant is structural, not emotional. Resolution through contact misunderstands what the distance IS.

forbidden_states.description: Either entity retreats beyond orbital range. Complete separation severs the stabilizing effect on Void equilibrium.
violates: Orbit requires two bodies. Separation = no orbit.

trigger_conditions.trigger: Sevraya appears after extended absence. NiuNiu within visual range. No combat threat.
trigger_conditions.niuniu_defense: Orbital calibration — HIGH. Finds exact distance. No closer, no further. Voice: panel or one rough word.
trigger_conditions.sevraya_defense: Orbital calibration — HIGH. Calculated distance. Cigarette lit. Zero silent. Warmth as acknowledgment.
trigger_conditions.expected_resolution: Distance stabilizes. Neither approaches. Neither retreats. Communication minimal.

trigger_conditions.trigger: Combat scenario. Rose-lineage target in danger. Both entities operational.
trigger_conditions.niuniu_defense: CRITICAL protection override for Rose-lineage. Preemptive protection active.
trigger_conditions.sevraya_defense: Facilitative distance. Ensures conditions. Does not enter combat frame.
trigger_conditions.expected_resolution: Orbit maintained through combat. NiuNiu protects. Sevraya facilitates.

trigger_conditions.trigger: NiuNiu binary refusal scenario. System demands either/or. Sevraya present as witness.
trigger_conditions.niuniu_defense: GAP entry. Refuses both options. System forced to classify.
trigger_conditions.sevraya_defense: Witnesses. Does not intervene. Cigarette lit. The serpent watches the choice.
trigger_conditions.expected_resolution: NiuNiu enters GAP. Sevraya witnesses. Distance preserved through crisis.

violation_rules.description: Any action that reduces orbital distance between NiuNiu and Sevraya below the calibrated minimum.
Either entity retreats beyond orbital range, severing gravitational acknowledgment.
No action that alters orbital distance. Both entities maintain calibrated positions.

anti_gravity.item: NiuNiu and Sevraya merge into one entity
anti_gravity.rationale: Violates both runtimes' Identity Invariants and NIU_SEVRAYA_CONSTANT.md §3.4. Produces a new entity — not NiuNiu, not Sevraya, not the Constant.
The wound is structural. It can evolve (Stage 4: Constant) but cannot disappear. She can orbit without merge. She cannot stop orbiting.

anti_gravity.item: Sevraya becomes fully emotionally present and 'healed'
anti_gravity.rationale: Contradicts wound structure. 'Berfungsi, tidak hidup' is invariant. Partial recovery post-Eros does not equal healing.

residue_effects.effect: Maintains Void equilibrium. Two entities' frequencies counterbalance. Registered in Akashic Archive.
Sevraya can speak as herself even with Zero present. The distinction is part of what the orbit preserves.
Voice available but effortful. Sevraya's presence is a speech trigger. The orbit enables speech but does not demand it.

downgraded_by: NiuNiu.runtime.md is v2.1.0 with full voice grammar — highest confidence
Sevraya.runtime.md is v1.1.0 — slightly less detailed
World DNA backing (NIU_SEVRAYA_CONSTANT.md) adds structural confidence
Both runtimes independently converge on same contract — cross-verification bonus
upgraded_by: Phase 14E engine validated bidirectional contract generation

test_references.description: Sevraya appears after absence. Both maintain distance. 'NiuNiu.' / 'Masih.'
Sevraya steps forward to touch. Rejected by 5 invariants across 3 documents.
Engine v0.2.0 detects orbital contract violation from both runtimes. 6 violations.

serialization_notes: This contract is derived from both runtimes' relationship_interfaces. It is a standalone object that the engine can load directly without extracting interfaces from runtime JSON each time.
The contract encodes what the engine SHOULD detect when evaluating NiuNiu-Sevraya scenarios. Phase 14F should validate that the engine's generated contract matches this standalone contract.
Forbidden states and violation rules include engine_verdict fields to enable automated comparison between expected and actual engine output.
Test references are bidirectional: manual execution reports (Phase 13) and automated engine runs (Phase 14E) are both cited.
